text: Alan Greenspan, economist and longtime head of the Federal Reserve, dies at 100 - NBC News
fullText: Alan Greenspan, the former chairman of the Federal Reserve Board whose economic prowess was indelibly marred for some by his actions leading up to the 2008 financial crisis, has died.

text: Goose ‘reeling’ after dad Paul Kueker fell to his death at Madison Square Garden concert — pays tribute in Central Park - New York Post

text: Remember that star that was supposed to explode in 2024? It didn't, but it could still happen soon - CBC
fullText: A new naked-eye star was supposed to grace our skies in 2024, but it never happened. Astronomers say that it's still on the books and could even happen soon.

text: Trump-backed populist wins tight Colombia presidential vote, sparking protests - CBS News

text: The most unpredictable meteor shower of the year peaks this week. Here's what to expect - Space

text: Australian police uncover 3 tons of cocaine - NPR
fullText: The drug was found on June 19 in plastic tubs buried in bunkers hidden beneath three shipping containers. Two Sydney residents were arrested. They face potential sentences of life in prison.
